title: SeasonRunStateV1
description: Per-season execution state. Read and written on every orchestrator invocation. Governs batch progress, termination, and crash recovery.
$comment:
Governing contract: ORCHESTRATOR-EXECUTION-CONTRACT.md
  Section IV (microBatchCount, auditCycleCount, subcategoryCounts, exhaustionCounters)
  Section V (terminationStatus enum)
  Section VI (incompleteBatchFlag — crash recovery)
  Section VII (retryFailureCount)

batch_id format (design decision): BATCH_{season}_{microBatchCount:04d}
batch_id is operational state — not canonical identity.
Deterministic Global Identity Framework does not govern pre-canonical
operational identifiers.

commit_state lifecycle: idle → in_progress → committed | failed
Required for read-back verification per Section IV Step 3:
"Verify write by read-back."

Crash recovery: On invocation, if incompleteBatchFlag === true,
discard entire batch, reset activeBatchId to null, set
incompleteBatchFlag to false, initiate new micro-batch.
Per Section VI: "No partial resume. No cluster-level resume."

terminationStatus.description: 'running' = normal operation. 'sealed' = NTI allSurfacesSealed. 'exhausted' = NTI exhaustionTriggered. 'system_failure' = retry failure threshold reached. No new micro-batch if != 'running'.

microBatchCount.description: Total micro-batches completed this season run. Incremented at end-of-batch boundary per Section IV Step 4.

auditCycleCount.description: Number of NTI audit cycles completed. Incremented when audit interval threshold is reached.

retryFailureCount.description: Consecutive specialist agent failures. If >= 2, terminationStatus set to 'system_failure' per Section VII.

incompleteBatchFlag.description: Set to true when a micro-batch begins. Set to false on successful checkpoint. If true on invocation start, crash recovery protocol activates: discard batch, do not mutate canonical registry.

activeBatchId.description: ID of the currently active micro-batch. Null when no batch is in progress. Format: BATCH_{season}_{microBatchCount:04d}. Set at batch start, cleared on successful checkpoint.

commitState.description: Tracks atomic commit status for read-back verification. idle = no active commit. in_progress = write started. committed = read-back confirmed. failed = write not confirmed.

subcategoryCounts.description: NTI surface subcategory coverage counts. Keys are surface names. Values are integer counts. Updated at end-of-batch boundary.

exhaustionCounters.description: NTI exhaustion tracking counters per surface. Updated at end-of-batch boundary.

lastUpdated.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of last state write. Updated on every successful checkpoint.
